programme.desc: Mark is with guest and great friend Jimmy Jennings. Jimmy helped get The Direction, Marks dream of filming outdoor TV, to reality. His team at One Call Concepts supported Marks idea of delivering The Call 811, the national call before you dig number and safe digging message, to the outdoor viewer thru outdoor TV a reality. It was Mark’s dream as a kit to host an outdoor show. Jimmy and his team took a risk that the show would take off and it did. Now airing on multiple outdoor networks and digital distribution platforms, Jimmy’s belief and Mark’s crazy dream has taken the safe digging message to tens of millions of viewers over the last 9 years. programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: With over 30 scholarship offers and a place in his high school’s Hall of Fame, Mario Eugenio embodies the rewards of hard work and dedication. But what happens when plans go awry? Find out as Country Ball follows his story.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: It’s the finale of Country Ball season one. Through their journey, Dylan and Luca have become brothers. With Jesse’s help, they’ll show just how much they’ve grown as players. Get ready to cheer for some incredible football. You’re not going to want to miss this!

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode kicks off inside the headquarters of Law Enforcement Specialists, where their mission is clear: Prevent. Protect. Respond. From their signed officer wall to their welcoming space for first responders, Bonnie and her team are on the front lines for those who serve. We also get an inside look at their groundbreaking Blue Dispatch software, helping departments streamline jobs and response times. Next, the A-Team travels to Naples, Florida, to celebrate the grand opening of David Beavis’ newest gallery, where his breathtaking photography delivers a powerful message of God’s love and the beauty of creation. Then, Eric Couch of Provision Brokerage shows how his company protects seniors’ “safe money” and builds retirement security for the long haul. Finally, we visit the Connected & Protected call center with president Adam Marsh, where their team makes it simple for seniors to stay safe with innovative, easy-to-use technology.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Six Monsters of poker with more than $60 million in combined career tournament earnings battle at Borgata Hotel Casino & Spa in the WPT Monster Invitational. programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Six Monsters of poker with more than $60 million in combined career tournament earnings compete at Borgata Hotel & Casino in the WPT Monster Invitational, and Vanessa Selbst commands the chip lead with three players remaining. Selbst, David Williams, and Phil Laak battle at the winner-take-all final table for a special World Poker Tour prize package and a pair of Monster 24K® headphones.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour returns to Playground Poker Club in Montreal, Quebec, Canada, and 732 players compete for their share of the more than $2 million prize pool. Season XIII WPT Player of the Year Mukul Pahuja is at the final table, looking to finally etch his name on the coveted WPT Champions Cup™, and he is joined by fellow professionals Jonathan Jaffe, Kevin MacPhee, and local Sam Chartier.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Five players remain at the final table of WPT Montreal at Playground Poker Club. The winner will take home more than $400,000, along with a pair of Monster® 24K® headphones and a Hublot® King Power Unico Watch. Season XIII WPT Player of the Year Mukul Pahuja sits in third chip position, trailing chip leader Jonathan Jaffe and Ratharam Sivagnanam.

programme.title: S1E3 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

programme.title: One Dollar Too Many 1968
programme.desc: In One Dollar Too Many, three schemers—played by Antonio Sabàto, John Saxon, and Frank Wolff—race each other across the frontier in a madcap chase for stolen loot. Double-crosses, disguises, and comic chaos pile up as each man tries to outwit the others, with greed proving to be the wildest outlaw of all. A playful twist on the Spaghetti Western, this action-packed romp mixes gunfights with sharp humor and larger-than-life characters.

programme.title: Arizona Stagecoach (1942) Colorized
programme.desc: In Arizona Stagecoach, cowboy star Ray ‘Crash’ Corrigan teams up with Dennis Moore and Max Terhune for another hard-riding adventure. When a ruthless gang plots to seize control of the stage line, the heroes saddle up to protect the trail and defend the innocent. With blazing six-guns, daring stunts, and a touch of Alibi’s trademark humor, this action-packed Western delivers thrills straight from the saddle.

programme.title: Drum Taps 1933
programme.desc: In Drum Taps, cowboy star Ken Maynard rides into action when a vicious gang threatens to overrun the frontier. With his trusty horse Tarzan at his side, he rallies ranchers and townsfolk alike to stand against lawlessness. Packed with galloping chases, blazing six-guns, and Maynard’s trademark heroics, this early sound Western delivers classic thrills straight from the saddle.

programme.title: Ben and Charlie 1972
programme.desc: In Ben and Charlie, Giuliano Gemma and George Eastman team up in a Spaghetti Western full of action, humor, and mischief. Ben, a smooth-talking drifter, and Charlie, a hot-tempered brawler, form an unlikely partnership as they stumble from one scheme to another across the frontier. Chased by outlaws, double-crossed by swindlers, and forever at odds with each other, the two rogues turn trouble into adventure at every turn. With sharp banter, lively gunfights, and offbeat charm, this buddy Western proves that friendship can be as wild as the West itself.

programme.title: Law of the Rio Grande 1931
programme.desc: In Law of the Rio Grande, cowboy star Bob Custer rides into a frontier torn by treachery and greed. When outlaws threaten to seize control of the range, he takes a stand to defend justice and protect the innocent. With fast-paced action, thrilling shootouts, and a touch of frontier romance, this early sound-era Western delivers straight-shooting adventure on the rugged Rio Grande.

programme.title: Eat Play Stay: O Little Town of Bethlehem, PA
